publishedAbstract: - When we created PVC via CNS, it fails to bound due to following error: ~~~ # oc describe pvc logging-es-1-n logging... Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Normal ExternalProvisioning 3m (x3783 over 15h) persistentvolume-controller waiting for a volume to be created, either by external provisioner "gluster.org/glusterblock" or manually created by system administrator ~~~- Some heketi-cli commands such as `heketi-cli volume list` or `heketi-cli topology info` returns following error: ~~~ Error: Id not found command terminated with exit code 255 ~~~
publishedTitle: Heketi fails to operate volumes due to Id not found error
